message:
test(conformance): add tool description parity verification against Python reference

Add a conformance test suite that verifies Rust MCP tool descriptions
match the Python reference fixture character-for-character. The fixture
(tool_descriptions.json) was generated from the Python MCP server and
serves as the canonical specification.

The test:
- Loads the Python reference fixture and discovers all Rust tools via
  fastmcp's ListToolsParams.
- Compares tool names, descriptions, and input schemas between the two
  implementations.
- Explicitly tracks Python-only tools not yet ported (expire_window,
  fetch_summary, fetch_topic, list_window_identities, rename_window,
  summarize_recent) as known gaps rather than failures.
- Uses env var serialization guards (EnvVarGuard) with OnceLock mutex
  to safely reset cached config state between tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
